emails.subject: Allocation schedule
emails.body: Allocation schedule We spoke prior to the holiday and you were working on a list on support names and projects that Research is working on for various BUs. Can you tell me how you are doing on that? Sarah Brown, my manager, had a meeting with Corp and they are disputing the billing we are proposing to bill to them ($1.9M). Their argument is that they are going to bill ENA back anyway; therefore, they have agreed to take 40% of the amount we intented to bill them in 2001, which is approximately $760K. If you have any questions, please call. Thanx.

emails.subject: Re: Allocation schedule
emails.body: Re: Allocation schedule Becky, We proably need to meet for a few minutes to explain the way I estimated charges. Vince Becky Pham 01/16/2001 01:47 PM
